verses.sanskrit: प्रसक्ताश्रुमुखीत्येवं ब्रुवन्ती जनकात्मजा ।अधोमुखमुखी बाला विलप्तुमुपचक्रमे ।। ५.२४.१।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter ogre women with a cruel nature, with crooked faces neared that Seetha and spoke unpleasant 
words harshly.

verses.sanskrit: उन्मत्तेव प्रमत्तेव भ्रान्तचित्तेव शोचती ।उपावृत्ता किशोरीव विवेष्टन्ती महीतले ।। ५.२४.२।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! Why are you not agreeing to stay in the gynaeceum pleasing to all beings together with 
very best beds."

verses.sanskrit: राघवस्याप्रमत्तस्य रक्षसा कामरूपिणा ।रावणेन प्रमथ्याहमानीता क्रोशती बलात् ।। ५.२४.३।।।।
verses.text:
"You who are a human are thinking highly about the wifehood of a human being. Withdraw your mind 
from Rama. Otherwise you will not exist at all."

verses.sanskrit: राक्षसी वशमापन्ना भर्त्यमाना सुदारुणम् ।चिन्तयन्ती सुदुःखार्ता नाहं जीवितुमुत्सहे ।। ५.२४.४।।।।
verses.text:
"Sport according to your comfort coming together with the king of ogres Ravana enjoying luxuries 
of the three worlds and taking him as husband.

verses.sanskrit: न हि मे जीवितेनार्थो नैवार्थैर्न च भूषणैः ।वसन्त्या राक्षसी मध्ये विना रामं महारथम् ।। ५.२४.५।।।।
verses.text:
"O beautiful one! O irrreproachable one! But being a human you are desiring that Rama who is a 
human, banished from kingdom, unsuccessful and gloomy."

verses.sanskrit: धिङ्मामनार्यामसतीं याहं तेन विना कृता ।मुहूर्तमपि रक्षामि जीवितं पापजीविता ।। ५.२४.६।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha with eyes like lotuses hearing the words of ogre women spoke these words with eyes filled 
with tears.

verses.sanskrit: का च मे जीविते श्रद्धा सुखे वा तं प्रियं विना ।भर्तारं सागरान्ताया वसुधायाः प्रियं वदम् ।। ५.२४.७।।।।
verses.text:
"All of you coming together whatever words which are hated in the world you spoke in my matter, 
this does it not seem sinful in your mind?"

verses.sanskrit: भिद्यतां भक्ष्यतां वापि शरीरं विसृजाम्यहम् ।न चाप्यहं चिरं दुःखं सहेयं प्रियवर्जिता ।। ५.२४.८।।।।
verses.text:
"Human woman is not waited to become wife of an ogre. All of you freely eat me. I will not honour 
your words."

verses.sanskrit: चरणेनापि सव्येन न स्पृशेयं निशाचरम् ।रावणं किं पुनरहं कामयेयं विगर्हितम् ।। ५.२४.९।।।।
verses.text:
"Although wretched or without kingdom, whoever is my husband, He alone is my master. Like Suvarchala 
with the Sun God, I am fond of Him always."

verses.sanskrit: प्रत्याख्यातं न जानाति नात्मानं नात्मनः कुलम् ।यो नृशंस स्वभावेन मां प्रार्थयितुमिच्छति ।। ५.२४.१०।।।।
verses.text:
"Like the highly fortunate Sachi who waits upon Indra, like Arundhati on Vasishta, like Rohini 
on the Moon God, like Lopamudra on Agastya, like Sukanya on Chyavana, like Savitri on Satyavanta, like Srimati 
on Kapila, like Madayanti on Saudasa, like Kesini on Sagara, like Damayanti the daughter of Bhima, devoted to 
husband Nala, in the same way I am devoted to my husband Rama, the best in Ikshvaku dynasty."

verses.sanskrit: छिन्ना भिन्ना विभक्ता वा दीप्ते वाग्नौ प्रदीपिता ।रावणं नोपतिष्ठेयं किं प्रलापेन वश् चिरम् ।। ५.२४.११।।।।
ख्यातः प्राज्ञः कृतज्ञश्च सानुक्रोशश्च राघवः ।सद्वृत्तो निरनुक्रोशः शङ्के मद्भाग्यसङ्क्षयात् ।। ५.२४.१२।।।।
राक्षसानां जनस्थाने सहस्राणि चतुर्दश ।येनैकेन निरस्तानि स मां किं नाभिपद्यते ।। ५.२४.१३।।।।
verses.text:
Ogre women incited by Ravana listening to the words of Seetha, swooned with anger and frightened 
Her with harsh words.

verses.sanskrit: निरुद्धा रावणेनाहमल्पवीर्येण रक्षसा ।समर्थः खलु मे भर्ता रावणं हन्तुमाहवे ।। ५.२४.१४।।।।
verses.text:
That monkey Hanuma not talking and hiding in the Simsupa tree listened to those ogre women frightening 
Seetha.

verses.sanskrit: विराधो दण्डकारण्ये येन राक्षसपुङ्गवः ।रणे रामेण निहतः स मां किं नाभिपद्यते ।। ५.२४.१५।।।।
verses.text:
Nearing that Seetha shaking with fear in all directions, those ogres being angry licked a lot shining 
and hanging lips.

verses.sanskrit: कामं मध्ये समुद्रस्य लङ्केयं दुष्प्रधर्षणा ।न तु राघवबाणानां गतिरोधी ह विद्यते ।। ५.२४.१६।।।।
verses.text:
Being angry a lot and grasping axes quickly spoke as follows: "This woman is not suited to have 
the king of ogres Ravana as husband."

verses.sanskrit: किं नु तत्कारणं येन रामो दृढपराक्रमः ।रक्षसापहृतां भार्यामिष्टां नाभ्यवपद्यते ।। ५.२४.१७।।।।
verses.text:
Being frightened by ogre women who were horrible that Seetha with best face with tears in eyes 
and moving from there reached that Simsupa tree.

verses.sanskrit: इहस्थां मां न जानीते शङ्के लक्ष्मणपूर्वजः ।जानन्नपि हि तेजस्वी धर्षणां मर्षयिष्यति ।। ५.२४.१८।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter the wide eyed Seetha nearing that Simsupa tree being surrounded by ogre women was situated 
there with gloom.

verses.sanskrit: हृतेति योऽधिगत्वा मां राघवाय निवेदयेत् ।गृध्रराजोऽपि स रणे रावणेन निपातितः ।। ५.२४.१९।।।।
verses.text:
Those ogres frightened from all directions that Seetha who was emaciated with a pitiful face and 
wearing dirty garments.

verses.sanskrit: कृतं कर्म महत्तेन मां तदाभ्यवपद्यता ।तिष्ठता रावणद्वन्द्वे वृद्धेनापि जटायुषा ।। ५.२४.२०।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter an ogre woman named Vinata with a horrible appearance with an angry form, crooked, having 
a prominent belly spoke to Her.

verses.sanskrit: यदि मामिह जानीयाद्वर्तमानां स राघवः ।अद्य बाणैरभिक्रुद्धः कुर्याल्लोकमराक्षसं ।। ५.२४.२१।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! You have showed love of husband. This much is enough. O auspicious one! At all times 
doing something excessively serves as vice."

verses.sanskrit: विधमेच्च पुरीं लङ्कां शोषयेच्च महोदधिम् ।रावणस्य च नीचस्य कीर्तिं नाम च नाशयेत् ।।५.२४.२२।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! I am happy. Human duty has been done by you. Let there be fortune to you. Do also according 
to my wholesome words being told."

verses.sanskrit: ततो निहतनथानां राक्षसीनां गृहे गृहे ।यथाहमेवं रुदती तथा भूयो न संशयः ।अन्विष्य रक्षसां लङ्कां कुर्याद्रामः सलक्ष्मणः ।। ५.२४.२३।।।।
verses.text:
"Obtain as husband Ravana who is the lord of al l ogres, bold and handsome, like Indra the lord 
of Devas, able one and liberal with a pleasing appearance to all."

verses.sanskrit: न हि ताभ्यां रिपुर्दृष्टो मुहूतमपि जीवति ।चिता धूमाकुलपथा गृध्रमण्डलसङ्कुला ।अचिरेण तु लङ्केयं श्मशानसदृशी भवेत् ।। ५.२४.२४।।।।
अचिरेणैव कालेन प्राप्स्याम्येव मनोरथम् ।दुष्प्रस्थानोऽयमाख्याति सर्वेषां वो विपर्ययः ।। ५.२४.२५।।।।
verses.text:
"Leaving Rama who is a human and miserable, seek refuge in Ravana. O Seetha! With best unguents 
to the body and decorated with best ornaments, become mistress of all the worlds from today."

verses.sanskrit: यादृशानि तु दृश्यन्ते लङ्कायामशुभानि तु ।अचिरेणैव कालेन भविष्यति हतप्रभा ।। ५.२४.२६।।।।
verses.text:
"O auspicious one! Like Svaha the wife of the Fire God, like Sachi the wife of Indra become mistress 
of all worlds. O Seetha! What is the use with Rama who is miserable and with gone vigour."

verses.sanskrit: नूनं लङ्का हते पापे रावणे राक्षसाधिपे ।शोषं यास्यति दुर्धर्षा प्रमदा विधवा यथा ।। ५.२४.२७।।।।
verses.text: If you do not do my this spoken word, all of us in this moment will eat you.

verses.sanskrit: पुष्योत्सवसमृद्धा च नष्टभर्त्री सराक्षसा ।भविष्यति पुरी लङ्का नष्टभर्त्री यथाङ्गना ।। ५.२४.२८।।।।
verses.text: Another ogre named Vikata with hanging breasts raising fist and roaring with anger spoke to Seetha.

verses.sanskrit: नूनं राक्षसकन्यानां रुदन्तीनां गृहे गृहे ।श्रोष्यामि नचिरादेव दुःखार्तानाम् इह ध्वनिम् ।। ५.२४.२९।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha with an evil mind! Your many words which are unpleasant have been tolerated due to pity 
and due to softness."

verses.sanskrit: सान्धकारा हतद्योता हतराक्षसपुङ्गवा ।भविष्यति पुरी लङ्का निर्दग्धा रामसायकैः ।। ५.२४.३०।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! You are not doing according to our word which is respected by time and wholesome. You 
have been brought to this bank of the ocean not obtainable by others. You have entered the terrible gynaeceum 
of Ravana."

verses.sanskrit: यदि नाम स शूरो मां रामो रक्तान्तलोचनः ।जानीयाद्वर्तमानां हि रावणस्य निवेशने ।। ५.२४.३१।।।।
अनेन तु नृशंसेन रावणेनाधमेन मे ।समयो यस्तु निर्दिष्टस्तस्य कालोऽयमागतः ।। ५.२४.३२।।।।
verses.text:
"Withheld in the house of Ravana well protected by us, even Devendra himself is not capable to 
protect you."

verses.sanskrit: अकार्यं ये न जानन्ति नैरृताः पापकारिणः ।अधर्मात्तु महोत्पातो भविष्यति हि साम्प्रतम् ।। ५.२४.३३।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! Do according to my word, which is beneficial. Discharge of tears is enough. Leave worthless 
gloom."

verses.sanskrit: नैते धर्मं विजानन्ति राक्षसाः पिशिताशनाः ।ध्रुवं मां प्रातराशार्थे राक्षसः कल्पयिष्यति ।। ५.२४.३४।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! Have love and happiness. Leave this daily gloom. Sport according to comfort with the 
king of ogres."

verses.sanskrit: साहं कथं करिष्यामि तं विना प्रियदर्शनम् ।रामं रक्तान्तनयनमपश्यन्ती सुदुःखिता ।। ५.२४.३५।।।।
verses.text:
"O timid one! You know how youth of women is not lasting. As long as your youth will not pass away, 
so long get comfort."

verses.sanskrit: यदि कश्चित्प्रदाता मे विषस्याद्य भवेदिह ।क्षिप्रं वैवस्वतं देवं पश्येयं पतिना विना ।। ५.२४.३६।।।।
verses.text:
"O one with intoxicating eyes! You along with king of ogres roam beautiful groves, mountains and 
nearby forests.

verses.sanskrit: नाजानाज्जीवतीं रामः स मां लक्ष्मणपूर्वजः ।जानन्तौ तौ न कुर्यातां नोर्व्यां हि मम मार्गणम् ।। ५.२४.३७।।।।
verses.text:
"O beautiful one! seven thousand women will be in your control. Have as husband Ravana the lord 
of all ogres."

verses.sanskrit: नूनं ममैव शोकेन स वीरो लक्ष्मणाग्रजः ।देवलोकमितो यातस्त्यक्त्वा देहं महीतले ।। ५.२४.३८।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! If you do not do according to my spoken word as is, I will eat your heart indeed by 
plucking it out."

verses.sanskrit: धन्या देवाः सगन्धर्वाः सिद्धाश्च परमर्षयः ।मम पश्यन्ति ये नाथं रामं राजीवलोचनम् ।। ५.२४.३९।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter an ogre woman named Chandodari swooning with anger, turning around a big spike spoke 
this word.

verses.sanskrit: अथ वा न हि तस्यार्थे धर्मकामस्य धीमतः ।मया रामस्य राजर्षेर्भार्यया परमात्मनः ।। ५.२४.४०।।।।
verses.text:
"Seeing this woman with eyes like that of a deer, with moving breasts due to fear, abducted by 
Ravana, there occured to me a great desire."

verses.sanskrit: दृश्यमाने भवेत्प्रीतः सौहृदं नास्त्यपश्यतः ।नाशयन्ति कृतघ्रास्तु न रामो नाशयिष्यति ।। ५.२४.४१।।।।
verses.text:
"It is my mind to eat the liver, the spleen, flesh above heart and heart together with muscle and 
entrails and the head."

verses.sanskrit: किं नु मे न गुणाः के चित्किं वा भाग्य क्षयो हि मे ।याहं सीता वरार्हेण हीना रामेण भामिनी ।। ५.२४.४२।।।।
verses.text:
An ogre woman named Pragasa spoke these words : "Squeeze the neck of this cruel woman. Why do we 
delay?"

verses.sanskrit: श्रेयो मे जीवितान्मर्तुं विहीना या महात्मना ।रामादक्लिष्टचारित्राच्छूराच्छत्रुनिबर्हणात् ।। ५.२४.४३।।।।
verses.text:
"Thereafter let it be known to the king that that human woman has died. He will say thus : "Eat.". 
There is no doubt in this matter."

verses.sanskrit: अथ वा न्यस्तशस्त्रौ तौ वने मूलफलाशनौ ।भ्रातरौ हि नर श्रेष्ठौ चरन्तौ वनगोचरौ ।। ५.२४.४४।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter an ogre woman named Ajamukhi spoke these words : "All of you killing this woman thereafter 
do equal pieces."

verses.sanskrit: अथ वा राक्षसेन्द्रेण रावणेन दुरात्मना ।छद्मना घातितौ शूरौ भ्रातरौ रामलक्ष्मणौ ।। ५.२४.४५।।।।
verses.text:
"Thereafter all of us will divide. Quarrel is not desirable to me. Liquor, many kinds and a lot 
of lickables be brought quickly."

verses.sanskrit: साहमेवङ्गते काले मर्तुमिच्छामि सर्वथा ।न च मे विहितो मृत्युरस्मिन्दुःखेऽपि वर्तति ।। ५.२४.४६।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter an ogre woman named Surpanakha spoke these words: "That which was spoken by Ajamukhi, 
is desirable to me."

verses.sanskrit: धन्याः खलु महात्मानो मुनयः सत्यसंमताः ।जितात्मानो महाभागा येषां न स्तः प्रियाप्रिये ।। ५.२४.४७।।।।
verses.text:
"Liquor which is the destroyer of all sorrow be brought quickly. Eating human flesh afterwards, 
we will dance for propitiating Nikumbila."

verses.sanskrit: प्रियान्न सम्भवेद्दुःखमप्रियादधिकं भयम् ।ताभ्यां हि ये वियुज्यन्ते नमस्तेषां महात्मनाम् ।। ५.२४.४८।।।।
verses.text:
Thus being frightened by horrible ogres, that Seetha equalling a daughter of gods, abandoning fortitude, 
was crying.

verses.sanskrit: साहं त्यक्ता प्रियेणेह रामेण विदितात्मना ।प्राणांस्त्यक्ष्यामि पापस्य रावणस्य गता वशम् ।। ५.२४.४९।।
